text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member A
text_block_list.text:
We can't have a Fan Fest without food stalls! We
need booths that sell things like drinks and
desserts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear voices coming from a classroom, and when I
take a peek inside, I see a group of students
avidly planning for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member B
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I suppose we could play it safe and
do a class cafe, but what do you think, Pearl?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... That might not be so bad, but what we
really need is something fans can't experience
anywhere else.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Since they're coming out all this way, shouldn't we
treat them to something special?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: We must widen our minds and be flexible with our ideas! It's not enough to just think outside the box—we have to think over and beyond the box!

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member A
text_block_list.text:
Treat them to something special... Yeah, that
would definitely make things more interesting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl's rallying call inspires the rest of
the students, and they begin to excitedly discuss
their ideas for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Okay, how about doing an Horsegirl-powered
merry-go-round?! We can make a ride that we
manually push in circles! What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Committee Member B
text_block_list.text:
Why stop there? Let's add similar rides, like
Horsegirl-powered spinning cups!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Do you have something to add? Go ahead,
we're all ears.
choice_data_list: Won't it be hard to implement?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Do you have something to add? Go ahead,
we're all ears.
choice_data_list: Won't it be hard to implement?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it won't be easy, but it's not impossible to
bring to life either.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
We just have to think of a way we can we make
this dream into a reality!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
As long as we all put our heads together, I'm sure
we can find a way! I have no doubt everything'll
turn out great!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I wouldn't have been able to think of it if
not for how inspired I was by everyone's ideas.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
There's a spark of the most wonderful potential
within each and every one of them.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If we all work hard together, I'm sure we can make
this Fan Fest the best in history!
